article.headline: Leverkusen ease past Frankfurt 3-0 to open up seven-point lead
article.description: Bayer Leverkusen's Victor Boniface scored once and helped to set up two more goals for a 3-0 victory over visitors Eintracht Frankfurt on Sunday as the Bundesliga leaders opened up a provisional seven-point gap.
article.linkText: Leverkusen beat Frankfurt to extend league lead

images.name: Bayer Leverkusen put three past Eintracht Frankfurt
images.caption: Bayer Leverkusen made light work of Eintracht Frankfurt winning 3-0 in a comfortable performance.

video.headline: Bayer Leverkusen put three past Eintracht Frankfurt
video.caption: Bayer Leverkusen made light work of Eintracht Frankfurt winning 3-0 in a comfortable performance.
video.title: Bayer Leverkusen put three past Eintracht Frankfurt
video.description: Watch the Game Highlights from Bayer Leverkusen vs. Eintracht Frankfurt, 12/17/2023

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Bayer Leverkusen vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - Game Highlights) 2023/12/17 ESHEET

article.story:
Bayer Leverkusen's Victor Boniface scored once and helped to set up two more goals for a 3-0 victory over visitors Eintracht Frankfurt on Sunday as the Bundesliga leaders opened up a provisional seven-point gap.

Unbeaten in the league this season, Xabi Alonso's team took a 14th-minute lead with 22-year-old Nigeria international Boniface powering into the box and threading a low shot past two defenders and goalkeeper Kevin Trapp for his ninth goal of the campaign.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

Alejandro Grimaldo's 35th-minute free kick slid off the crossbar before Jeremie Frimpong doubled their lead in the 51st on the rebound after Trapp had saved a Boniface shot.

The striker then sent Florian Wirtz through with a clever pass for their third goal six minutes later with the Germany international chipping the ball over the keeper.

Leverkusen, who hit the woodwork twice late in the game through Wirtz and Piero Hincapie, are on 39 points with champions Bayern Munich, who host fourth-placed VfB Stuttgart later and also have a game in hand, in second on 32.

The Bundesliga stops for a winter break after next week's matches on Tuesday and Wednesday and will resume on Jan. 12.

Goal!  Bayer 04 Leverkusen 1, Eintracht Frankfurt 0. Victor Boniface (Bayer 04 Leverkusen) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Florian Wirtz.
